entries.title: MTLQ-ViT: Multi-Granularity Tail-Enhanced Logarithmic Quantization for Vision Transformers
entries.markdown: - Yan Kang, Shouhao Xu, Qika Lin, ***Kai He***, Zhan Gao, Zhuangzhuang Chen, Bin Pu. MTLQ-ViT: Multi-Granularity Tail-Enhanced Logarithmic Quantization for Vision Transformers [J]. Pattern Recognition, 2026: 113769.
entries.news: - *2026.04*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on vision transformer quantization is accepted by Pattern Recognition. Congrats to Dr. Kang.

entries.title: Toward a Multi-View Brain Network Foundation Model: Cross-View Consistency Learning Across Arbitrary Atlases
entries.markdown: - Jiaxing Xu, Jingying Ma, Xin Lin, Yuxiao Liu, ***Kai He***, Qika Lin, Yiping Ke, Yang Li, Dinggang Shen, Mengling Feng. Toward a Multi-View Brain Network Foundation Model: Cross-View Consistency Learning Across Arbitrary Atlases [Preprint]. arXiv:2603.20348, 2026.
entries.news: - *2026.03*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on multi-view brain network foundation model is released as an arXiv preprint. Congrats to Dr. Xu.

entries.title: MedForge: Interpretable Medical Deepfake Detection via Forgery-Aware Reasoning
entries.markdown: - Zhihui Chen, ***Kai He***, Qingyuan Lei, Bin Pu, Jian Zhang, Yuling Xu, Mengling Feng. MedForge: Interpretable Medical Deepfake Detection via Forgery-Aware Reasoning [Preprint]. arXiv:2603.18577, 2026.
entries.news: - *2026.03*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on interpretable medical deepfake detection is released as an arXiv preprint.

entries.title: Recovering Coherent Affective Patterns: Addressing Modality Missing in Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
entries.markdown: - Huiting Huang, Tieliang Gong, ***Kai He***, Wen Wen, Weizhan Zhang, Mengling Feng. Recovering Coherent Affective Patterns: Addressing Modality Missing in Multimodal Sentiment Analysis [C]. Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), 2026: 21957–21965.
entries.news: - *2026.02*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on recovering coherent affective patterns is accepted by AAAI 2026.

entries.title: A Survey of LLM Reasoning in Healthcare and Medicine: From Individual Modeling to Collaborative Agents
entries.markdown: - Qika Lin, Luwei Xiao, Bin Pu, Kaize Shi, Yanrui Du, Jiaxing Xu, ***Kai He***, Shuai Zhao, Erik Cambria, Swapnil Mishra, Mengling Feng. A Survey of LLM Reasoning in Healthcare and Medicine: From Individual Modeling to Collaborative Agents [Preprint]. TechRxiv, 2026.
entries.news: - *2026.02*:  🎉🎉 Our survey paper on LLM reasoning in healthcare and medicine is released as a TechRxiv preprint.

entries.title: From Latent Signals to Reflection Behavior: Tracing Meta-Cognitive Activation Trajectory in R1-Style LLMs
entries.markdown: - Yanrui Du, Yibo Gao, Sendong Zhao, Jiayun Li, Haochun Wang, Qika Lin, ***Kai He***, Bing Qin, Mengling Feng. From Latent Signals to Reflection Behavior: Tracing Meta-Cognitive Activation Trajectory in R1-Style LLMs [Preprint]. arXiv:2602.01999, 2026.
entries.news: - *2026.02*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on meta-cognitive activation trajectory in R1-style LLMs is released as an arXiv preprint.

entries.title: A3-Bench: Benchmarking Memory-Driven Scientific Reasoning via Anchor and Attractor Activation
aliases: A<sup>3</sup>-Bench: Benchmarking Memory-Driven Scientific Reasoning via Anchor and Attractor Activation
A^3-Bench: Benchmarking Memory-Driven Scientific Reasoning via Anchor and Attractor Activation
A³-Bench: Benchmarking Memory-Driven Scientific Reasoning via Anchor and Attractor Activation
entries.markdown: - Jian Zhang, Yu He, Zhiyuan Wang, Zhangqi Wang, ***Kai He***, Fangzhi Xu, Qika Lin, Jun Liu. A<sup>3</sup>-Bench: Benchmarking Memory-Driven Scientific Reasoning via Anchor and Attractor Activation [Preprint]. arXiv:2601.09274, 2026.
entries.news: - *2026.01*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on memory-driven scientific reasoning benchmark is released as an arXiv preprint.

entries.title: MARS: Multi-Agent Adaptive Reasoning with Socratic Guidance for Automated Prompt Optimization
entries.markdown: - Jian Zhang, Zhangqi Wang, Haiping Zhu, Kangda Cheng, ***Kai He***, Bo Li, Qika Lin, Jun Liu, Erik Cambria. MARS: Multi-Agent Adaptive Reasoning with Socratic Guidance for Automated Prompt Optimization [C]. Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), 2026: 16307–16315.
entries.news: - *2026.01*:  🎉🎉 Our paper on multi-agent adaptive reasoning for automated prompt optimization is accepted by AAAI 2026.
